title: BarRequiredArea
description: BarRequiredArea: Minimum required area of reinforcement for a Bar.

Top.description: Minimum required area of reinforcement in the top layer. Property has a quantity of type Area measured in [m²].

Bottom.description: Minimum required area of reinforcement in the bottom layer. Property has a quantity of type Area measured in [m²].

Perimeter.description: Minimum required area of perimeter reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type Area measured in [m²].

Shear.description: Minimum required area of shear reinforcement expressed as an area per unit length. Property has a quantity of type AreaPerUnitLength measured in [m²/m].

Torsion.description: Minimum required area of torsion reinforcement. Property has a quantity of type Area measured in [m²].

ModeNumber.description: Positive index, starting at one. Only set for cases with modal outputs such as dynamic cases.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

Position.description: Position on the bar as normalised length, i.e. 0 for start, 1 for end and 0.5 for middle.

Divisions.description: How many division points along the bar was used when extracting this result. This generally means that this many results with the same ObjectId, ResultCase and TimeStep was extracted.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
